_purpose: OFFLINE FALLBACK cache. Primary source is fetch-damodaran-data fetching Damodaran's full industry_averages spreadsheet (500+ industries). This file only covers cases where online fetch fails. SHIPPED STALE — first use MUST run --refresh-s2c-cache to fetch fresh data.
_source: Damodaran industry averages (total market cap weighted). Subset for offline use.
_how_to_update: Run fetch-damodaran-data with --refresh-s2c-cache flag to refresh from NYU Stern.
_ship_status: STALE_BY_DEFAULT — _fetched_at and _expires_at are null until --refresh-s2c-cache is run. Validators MUST treat null _fetched_at as 'cache not yet populated' and warn analyst to refresh.
_expiry_policy: Once refreshed, cache is valid for 6 months from _fetched_at. After expiry, fetch-damodaran-data MUST re-fetch online; if online fetch also fails, warn analyst that benchmark may be stale and ask them to manually verify.
_industry_key_policy: Industry keys are FREE-FORM strings (snake_case recommended but not enforced). Analysts may use any key (e.g. 'fintech', 'edtech', 'cloud_computing'). If a key is not in this cache AND online fetch fails, the validator will warn 'benchmark missing' and ask analyst to manually fill industry_s2c_benchmark.
